将手机应用接入HiCar，在车机屏幕上使用。.message: Integrate phone apps into HiCar for use on the car screen.

将HiCar集成进车载设备，例如车机、车载智慧屏、盒子等。.message: Integrate HiCar into in-vehicle devices such as head units, smart screens, boxes, etc.

通过粘贴的方式安装在中控台，无线连接使用HiCar，声音可以通过智慧屏发出，也可.message: Mount on the dashboard with adhesive, connect to HiCar wirelessly. Sound can play through the smart screen or car speakers (requires phone connected to car Bluetooth).

通过捆绑的方式安装在原车后视镜，无线连接使用HiCar，声音可以通过后视镜发出，.message: Mount on the original rearview mirror with straps, connect to HiCar wirelessly. Sound can play through the mirror or car speakers (requires phone connected to car Bluetooth).

盯盯拍推出的智慧中控屏，感觉比较通用，没有实际使用过，具体情况需要咨询客服。.message: A smart center console screen by DDPai. Seems quite universal, haven't personally used it. Please consult customer service for details.

车载香薰需绑定到智慧生活App，连接HiCar后，在HiCar界面显示香薰卡片，.message:
Bind the aromatherapy device to the Smart Life App. After connecting to HiCar, an aromatherapy card appears on the HiCar interface, allowing control of power, concentration, and modes. If buying, we recommend the 'Yuanqi Fengling' scent.
Instructions.
车载香薰需绑定到智慧生活App，连接HiCar后，在HiCar界面显示香薰卡片，.description: Boxpage features: description of aromatherapy device with link

儿童安全座椅需绑定到智慧生活App，连接HiCar后，在HiCar界面显示儿童安.message: Bind the child safety seat to the Smart Life App. After connecting to HiCar, a safety seat card appears on the HiCar interface, allowing control of power, ventilation, music playback, etc. May be unstable in HiCar currently.

有线连接手机使用，如果此时手机同时连接了HiCar，声音可以通过车内的音响发出，.message: Connect to phone via cable. If the phone is also connected to HiCar, sound can play through the car's speakers, creating a cinema-like viewing experience.

适用于原车有CarPlay、CarLife的车型.message: For vehicles with factory CarPlay or CarLife

适用于原车无中控屏幕或不计划更换中控的车型.message: For vehicles without a factory screen or not planning to replace the head unit

适用于计划更换中控车机的车型.message: For vehicles planning to replace the head unit

可以与HiCar一同使用的新奇玩意.message: Cool gadgets that work with HiCar
可以与HiCar一同使用的新奇玩意.description: Boxpage features: description of collaborative devices section (commented out)

使用前确认您的车支持HiCar.message: Confirm your vehicle supports HiCar before use

或者通过转换盒或其他方式支持HiCar.message: Or enable HiCar via an adapter box or other means

具体说明请参见指南中的\"检查车辆\"章节.message: See the "Check Vehicle" section in the guide for details

只有部分华为手机以及荣耀手机支持HiCar.message: Only some Huawei and Honor phones support HiCar

其他品牌手机并不支持HiCar.message: Phones from other brands do not support HiCar

具体说明请参见指南中的\"检查手机\"章节.message: See the "Check Phone" section in the guide for details

当车辆和手机都支持HiCar时.message: When both your vehicle and phone support HiCar

车载智慧屏/后视镜/后装车机.message: Smart Screen / Rearview Mirror / Aftermarket Head Unit

直接把车型报给客服.message: Tell customer service your vehicle model directly

为HiCar铁粉和开发者提供交流的角落.message: A corner for HiCar fans and developers to exchange ideas

第一时间汇报感知到HiCar最新消息.message: Reporting HiCar latest news as soon as it's perceived

网罗全网所有关于HiCar的资源.message: Gathering all HiCar resources from across the web

本站点为HiCar粉丝站点，提供HiCar相关的指南、设备信息、APK下载等内容.message: This is a fan site for HiCar, providing guides, device information, APK downloads, and more.

欢迎加入HiCar的大家庭，一起享受驾驶的乐趣。.message: Welcome to the HiCar family and enjoy the joy of driving together.

HUAWEI HiCar是华为打造的人-车-家全场景智慧互联解决方案，为您提供更.message: HUAWEI HiCar is Huawei's human-car-home all-scenario smart connectivity solution, providing you with a more convenient, intelligent, and safer travel experience.

按照手机搭载的HarmonyOS系统版本区分，HiCar可以区分为经典HiCar.message: Based on the HarmonyOS version on your phone, HiCar can be classified into Classic HiCar and Next HiCar.

手机上的HiCar应用是APK格式.message: HiCar app on phone is in APK format

手机上的HiCar应用是HAP格式.message: HiCar app on phone is in HAP format

想使用HiCar简单一句话就是：使用支持HiCar的手机连上支持HiCar的车使.message: Using HiCar is simple: connect a HiCar-supported phone to a HiCar-supported vehicle and use HiCar-supported apps.

您的浏览器不支持视频播放。.message: Your browser does not support video playback.

获取最新版本HiCar应用。.message: Get the latest version of the HiCar app.

通过这些设备可以让不支持HiCar的车也可以用上HiCar，以及在成功连接HiC.message: These devices let vehicles without HiCar support also use HiCar, and allow you to use various novel HiCar collaborative devices once connected.

推荐一些口碑还不错的转换盒，可以让原本不支持HiCar的车也可以用上HiCar。.message: Recommended well-reviewed adapter boxes that let vehicles without HiCar support also use HiCar.

hicar.cool 是 HiCar 非官方站点，由热爱驱动。.message: hicar.cool is an unofficial HiCar site, driven by passion.

一些或许有用或许无用的HiCar站点。.message: Some HiCar sites that may or may not be useful.

本站所有内容在Github开源，欢迎各位有能力有意愿的HiCar粉丝共同参与本站.message: All content on this site is open source on Github. HiCar fans with the ability and willingness are welcome to participate in building this site.

参与方式：在文档页面左下角\"编辑此页\"跳转到Github提交PR。.message: How to contribute: Click "Edit this page" at the bottom-left of any doc page to submit a PR on Github.

支持方式：如果本站对您有所帮助，您可以通过以下方式请站长喝杯蜜雪冰城.message: Support: If this site helps you, you can buy the site owner a cup of Mixue ice cream via

下载华为HiCar智能车载互联系统，体验智慧出行.message: Download HUAWEI HiCar Smart Vehicle Connectivity System, Experience Smart Travel

正式版本：系统支持即可安装使用.message: Stable Version: Can be installed if the system supports it.

请在纯血鸿蒙系统中打开。.message: Please open in HarmonyOS NEXT system.

1.优化听歌过程中来电挂断后的音频体验。.message: 1. Optimized audio experience after incoming calls during music playback.

2.优化部分场景下的连接稳定性。.message: 2. Improved connection stability in certain scenarios.

2.新增智慧桌面深浅模式随车机设置功能。.message: 2. Added Smart Desktop light/dark mode following car settings.

3.新增车机侧应用锁功能，您加锁后的应用只有在手机端解锁后才可使用。.message: 3. Added car-side app lock; locked apps can only be used after unlocking on the phone.

1.HarmonyOS NEXT纯血鸿蒙系统上首次独立更新。.message: 1. First independent update on HarmonyOS NEXT system.

1.当前独立更新的Next HiCar仅支持HarmonyOS 6.0及以上系统.message: 1. The current independently updated Next HiCar only supports HarmonyOS 6.0 and above.

2.当前暂无有效方式提取HAP包供无权限手机绕过应用市场进行安装。.message: 2. There is currently no effective way to extract HAP packages for installation on non-whitelisted phones without AppGallery.

经典HiCar仅支持部分华为手机，不支持小米、OPPO、VIVO等.message: Classic HiCar only supports some Huawei phones, not Xiaomi, OPPO, VIVO, etc.

以下 APK 仅可安装在已经支持 HiCar 的华为手机上（不包括Harmony.message: The following APKs can only be installed on Huawei phones that already support HiCar (excluding HarmonyOS NEXT systems with HarmonyOS 5 and above).

新特性的首发测试版本。通过会员中心体验官下载。.message: First test version of new features. Download via Members Center Experience Officer.

新特性的正式商用版本，会与众测版本有些细微的差别。通过应用市场下载。.message: Official commercial version of new features, with slight differences from beta. Download via AppGallery.

在正式版本之上额外开放花瓣地图以及微信投屏的版本。通过会员中心体验官下载。.message: Version with additional Petal Maps and WeChat screen projection on top of stable. Download via Members Center Experience Officer.

注意：23年7月已取消该类型版本.message: Note: This version type was discontinued in July 2023.

如果您想下载车机端HiCar，这是不现实的，具体原因可以参考.message: If you want to download the head unit HiCar, it's not feasible. For details, please refer to

本页面仅罗列应用/设备接入HiCar的文档链接，至于所需的SDK及相关工具官方并.message: This page only lists documentation links for app/device integration with HiCar. The required SDKs and tools have not been publicly released. Please follow the partnership process to apply to Huawei if needed.

Next HiCar版本首次独立更新，更新至6.0.95.120测试版本.message: Next HiCar First Independent Update: Version 6.0.95.120 Beta

增加Next HiCar应用分屏功能说明.message: Added Next HiCar split-screen app feature description

增加Next HiCar DOCK区域支持滑动、播放播放时隐藏的说明.message: Added Next HiCar DOCK sliding and auto-hide during playback

增加HiCar DOCK区域支持滑动、播放播放时隐藏的说明.message: Added HiCar DOCK sliding and auto-hide during playback

提供Next HiCar单独内容.message: Added dedicated Next HiCar content section
